name: Carrot Tea Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a medium bowl, sift together the flour, sugar, baking powder, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Beat the eggs until frothy and lemon-colored with an electric beater.
4. Gradually add the oil to the beaten eggs.
5. Mix in the dry ingredients alternately with the grated carrots and chopped pecans using a low-speed mixer.
6. Pour the batter into a greased 2-quart baking dish.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes or until a toothpick inserted in the center comes out clean.
8. Top with a sugar and milk glaze or frost with your favorite vanilla frosting mix, if desired.
